# 📝 Pull Request

Thank you for contributing to **Ijma Wallet**.  
Please complete the sections below to help us review your PR efficiently.

---

## 🔍 Summary

Describe the purpose of this pull request.  
What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

---

## 📐 Type of Change

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix  
- [ ] New feature  
- [ ] Security improvement  
- [ ] Refactor / code quality  
- [ ] Documentation update  
- [ ] Build / tooling  
- [ ] Other (explain below)

---

## 🧪 How to Test

Provide clear steps to test this change.

Example:

1. Open the wallet  
2. Navigate to Settings → Backup  
3. Verify the new behaviour  

If applicable, include screenshots or logs.

---

## 🔒 Security Considerations

Does this change affect:

- Transaction handling  
- Key management  
- Backup / recovery  
- Privacy  
- Network communication  

If **yes**, explain the impact and any mitigations.

---

## 📚 Related Issues

Link any related issues:

- Closes #123  
- Related to #456  

---

## ✔ Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this change thoroughly  
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed  
- [ ] I have followed the project’s coding style  
- [ ] I have not introduced sensitive information  
- [ ] I have considered security implications  
- [ ] I have rebased onto the latest `main`  

---

## 🗒 Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know?
